---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the bug you encountered.

---

## Environment

Please provide details about your system and build configuration:

| Component | Value                            |
|-----------|----------------------------------|
| **Operating System** | (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04) |
| **OS Version** | (e.g. Windows 11 25H2)           |
| **Compiler** | (e.g., MSVC v143, Clang 15)      |
| **Build Configuration** | (Debug, Release, Distribution)   |
| **Engine Version/Branch** | (e.g., main, develop)            |

---

## Steps to Reproduce

Provide clear steps to reproduce the bug:

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three
4. ...

---

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

---

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened instead.

---

## Error Messages & Logs

Include any error messages, stack traces, or relevant log output:

```
Paste error output here
```

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context or information that might help diagnose the issue:
- Screenshots or recordings
- Code snippets demonstrating the issue
- Related issues or pull requests

---

## Checklist

Before submitting, please verify that the following are true. When submitting, you understand that your issue will be closed if any of these are not met:

- [ ] I searched for existing issues and found none
- [ ] The issue title clearly describes the problem
- [ ] I provided steps to reproduce the bug
- [ ] I included relevant environment details
- [ ] I included error messages/logs when applicable
